alt: Stunning close-up of a juvenile kakapo's facial disc, delicate whiskers, and rounded beak
caption: They possess a specialized owl-like facial disc and highly sensitive rictal bristles to navigate the dark forest floor.
location: Anchor Island, Dusky Sound, New Zealand
acquisitionNotes: Exquisite crisp close-up of sensory facial vibrissae and beak structure. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/a/ad/K%C4%81k%C4%81p%C5%8D_head.jpg
attributionText: Photo by Kimberley Collins via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0
